title: Infiltrating Cosmos
relevance_summary: Developer with alleged North Korean ties involved in Liquid Staking Module (LSM) development, leading to potential security vulnerabilities.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves known compromised developers on critical modules.

red_flags: Lack of transparency in code reviews
Security patches authored by the same developers who introduced vulnerabilities
summary: The Liquid Staking Module (LSM) development was allegedly compromised by North Korean developers, leading to potential security vulnerabilities. A guard could have detected and blocked transactions involving these developers on critical modules.
